_meta.description: Daily valuation snapshot for listed insurers — price, market cap, P/GWP, P/B, P/E.
_meta.notes: Listed-insurer only (Star Health, Niva Bupa). Unlisted SAHIs (Care, Aditya Birla, ManipalCigna) have no market price → null (n/a). P/E and P/B sourced from the Screener public page; P/GWP = market cap ÷ latest-FY GWP.
